system.description: Effect: As a Complex Action costing 10PP, Jupitermon can transform into Wrath Mode for 1 combat encounter, gaining the moves @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-moves.5wialgI2y5Jn9La4]{Keraunos Divide} and @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-moves.oAEgDj3bfv0iZsD7]{Dios Thunder} as connected moves along with the corresponding stat modifications.
